Excellence in Every Surface
Hardwood & Laminate

Why settle for
ordinary floors
when yours can last
a lifetime?

Hardwood floors don't just look beautiful — they add measurable value to your property. Our master craftsmen install and finish every plank to perfection, giving your space warmth that never goes out of style.

Get a Free Quote →
🪵
25+ Years Guaranteed
Waterproofing Systems

One leak can cost
you thousands.
One call to us
prevents it all.

Water damage is the silent destroyer of buildings. Our hermetic waterproofing systems seal terraces, bathrooms and basements with industry-grade coatings — built to withstand the harshest conditions for decades.

Protect Your Property →
🛡️
100% Leak-Proof Seal
Tile & Stone Laying

Marble, granite,
porcelain — laid
with the precision
of a master.

From Italian marble bathrooms to outdoor granite terraces, our tile specialists handle every surface with meticulous care. Perfect alignment, flawless grouting, and finishes that stand up to daily life beautifully.

Explore Our Work →
🏛️
500+ Projects Completed
Epoxy & PU Coating

Industrial-strength
floors that take
the hit — so your
business never stops.

Warehouses, garages, factories, and commercial kitchens demand floors that can handle heavy loads and chemical spills. Our epoxy and polyurethane systems deliver a seamless, slip-resistant surface that lasts for years.

Request a Survey →
⚙️
10yr Durability Warranty
Pest & Termite Control

Termites work
24/7 destroying
your foundation.
So do we — stopping them.

A termite colony can silently consume the structural integrity of your building over months. Our pre- and post-construction treatments create a chemical barrier that eliminates infestations and prevents them from returning.

Book an Inspection →
🔬
0 Re-infestation Rate

About Lēvanto

Built on trust,
finished with craft.

Lēvanto is a specialist in flooring solutions, waterproofing systems and hermetic treatments. For over a decade, we have transformed spaces across Kerala — delivering surfaces that last and finishes that impress.

Whether it's a family home or a large commercial complex, our certified team brings the same dedication, precision and transparency to every project.

  • Certified installation and treatment experts
  • Premium-grade materials with warranty coverage
  • On-time delivery and transparent pricing
  • Free site inspection and consultation
  • After-service support and maintenance
